title: Why $35 Million Came to Kentucky — Massie's One Vote #shorts
description: Gallrein 54%, Massie 45%. $35M came to Kentucky to remove ONE "no" vote — on the BBB and on Israel funding. Public FEC. Full receipt → @CampaignReceipts #shorts #thomasmassie #aipac
